text:
I've fixed the Tuya integration code to use the correct credentials from your `tinytuya.json` file and installed the required `tinytuya` library. The database has been emptied by deleting the old `ecotrack.db` file, so the app will create a fresh one with only new data from your smart switch.

The integration now properly connects to Tuya Cloud and fetches real-time power data (voltage, current, power consumption). To run it continuously, use:

```
cd backend && source venv/bin/activate && python tuya_integration.py
```

Start the backend first with `python app.py` in another terminal. The system will now collect fresh data from your smart switch only.
